name: Alden Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Alden Courts in Duxbury, MA! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Bridgewater Pickleball Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bridgewater Pickleball Park in Bridgewater, MA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Briggs Playground
description: Briggs Playground is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Plymouth, MA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

description: Come play pickleball at Gates Middle School in Scituate, MA! There are 9 wood and asphalt courts. 4 are indoors and 5 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include water. The courts are free.

name: Kingsbury Club - Kingston MA
description: Kingsbury Club - Kingston MA is a place to play pickleball in Kingston, MA. There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. description: Village Sports Center is a private club. Membership is required, however, non-members may play at drop-in times for a daily fee. Please contact the club for updated drop-in times and fees.
